program.label: Central Texas Food Bank Warehouse Operations Program — Graduate
program.description: Full warehouse lifecycle: receiving, inventory, manufacturing, forklift operation, last-mile delivery logistics, and food safety certification. 63 million meals annually. 21 Central Texas counties.

stream.label: Writing
stream.item: Systems portfolio — a series applying institutional theory to supply chain and inventory problems. Hayek, Ostrom, and what optimization misses.

stream.label: Reading
stream.item: Soul of the Samurai: Modern Translations of Three Classic Works of Zen & Bushido

stream.label: Volunteering
stream.item: Planting baby trees, spring pruning, spreading mulch, and (always) picking up (more) trash. Next up: Keep Austin Beautiful Day — lake shoreline cleanup.
